title: helminthotheca spinifera
intro: Helminthotheca spinifera, also known as the spinifex grass or needle grass, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Helminthotheca spinifera include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
